recommendations.title: The Delta Force
recommendations.overview: A 707 aircraft jetliner, en route from Athens to Rome and then to New York City, is hijacked by Lebanese terrorists, who demand that the pilot take them to Beirut. What the terrorists don't realize is that an elite team of commandos have been called

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: The River of Souls
recommendations.overview: A group of Soul Hunters come to Babylon 5 demanding the return of something that was stolen from them.

recommendations.title: S.M.A.R.T. Chase
recommendations.overview: A washed-up private security agent has to escort a valuable Chinese antique out of Shanghai but is ambushed en route.

recommendations.title: I'm So Excited!
recommendations.overview: Something has gone wrong with the landing gear of a plane en route from Madrid to Mexico City. The group of eccentric travelers on the flight, defenseless in the face of danger, indulge in colourful confessionals, while the outlandish crew attempts t

recommendations.title: Judgment Night
recommendations.overview: Four young friends, while taking a shortcut en route to a local boxing match, witness a brutal murder which leaves them running for their lives.

recommendations.title: Rumours
recommendations.overview: En route to the annual G7 summit, the seven leaders of the world’s wealthiest liberal democracies get lost in the woods and face increasing peril while attempting to draft a provisional statement regarding a global crisis.
recommendations.director: Guy Maddin, Galen Johnson, Evan Johnson

recommendations.title: Death of a Unicorn
recommendations.overview: A father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to a weekend retreat, where his billionaire boss seeks to exploit the creature’s miraculous curative properties.

recommendations.title: Keanu
recommendations.overview: Friends hatch a plot to retrieve a stolen cat by posing as drug dealers for a street gang.

recommendations.title: Judas and the Black Messiah
recommendations.overview: Bill O'Neal infiltrates the Black Panthers on the orders of FBI Agent Mitchell and J. Edgar Hoover. As Black Panther Chairman Fred Hampton ascends—falling for a fellow revolutionary en route—a battle wages for O’Neal’s soul.

recommendations.title: Trail of the Pink Panther
